mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PP.PARTNO) AS cnt FROM TBL_PROD_PRODUCEPLAN PP LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON PP.PARTNO = G.PARTNO
PP.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND (PP.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})

SELECT PP.PRODUCEDT, PP.PLANTCD, PP.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, PP.ORDERNUM, PP.ORDERSEQ, PP.PRODUCEQTY, ISNULL(S.STOCKQTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_PRODUCEPLAN PP LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON PP.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARTNO, SUM(STOCKQTY) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO GROUP BY PARTNO) S ON PP.PARTNO = S.PARTNO
PP.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND PP.PRODUCEDT >= #{start_date} AND PP.PRODUCEDT <= #{end_date} AND (PP.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})
ORDER BY PP.PARTNO, PP.PRODUCEDT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_PRODUCEPLAN (PRODUCEDT, PLANTCD, PARTNO, ORDERNUM, ORDERSEQ, PRODUCEQTY, REGUSERID, REGDTM) VALUES (#{PRODUCEDT}, #{PLANTCD}, #{PARTNO}, #{ORDERNUM}, #{ORDERSEQ}, #{PRODUCEQTY}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT B.CHILD_PARTNO AS PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, G.UNIT_PRICE, G.COMPANYCD, C.COMPANYNM, B.REQQTY, ISNULL(S.STOCKQTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_COM_BOM B LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON B.CHILD_PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON G.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD LEFT JOIN (SELECT LS.PARTNO, SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO GROUP BY LS.PARTNO) S ON B.CHILD_PARTNO = S.PARTNO WHERE B.PAR_PARTNO = #{par_partno} AND B.USEYN = 1 ORDER BY B.ORD
